title: I don't want portal yet
description: turn on and off nether, end, otherside, twilight forest, blue skies and divine rpg portals
body: ***Mod adds command/config to disable nether, end, otherside and in the future other portals*** use **/portal "dimension" enabled true/false** to enable/disable or change value in config file use **/portaltimer** to setup timer You can ask "why i need this mod?". It's simple have you ever played with friends and they killed dragon on first day? Thats why. Thanks Coltonj96 for logo <3 **TODO:** - ~~command to disable/enable~~ added in 1.1 - ~~ability to turn off end portal~~ added in 1.2 - ~~FTB quest compatibility~~ nah im too stupid, just use command reward - compatibility for other mods : • deeper and darker added in 1.4 • twilight forest added in 1.5 (for 1.19.2-4) and in 1.1 (for 1.18.2) • blue skies added in 1.6 (for 1.19.2-4) • divine rpg added in 1.7(for 1.19.2-4) in 1.3 (for 1.20-1) **FAQ** q: can i use this mod in modpack? a: yup q: backport / update? a: yup, but not under 1.16.5 q: fabric port? a: same answer as previous MOD IS OPEN SOURCE **Need server? Use code "ultra" for 15% discount**
